message:
feat(sdk): add EventListeners system, RPC transport client, and unified
SessionTransport abstraction for multi-modal SDK consumption

EventListeners (~120 lines):
- Add SubscriptionId opaque handle for managing event subscriptions
- Add typed callback aliases: OnToolStart, OnToolEnd, OnStreamEvent
  for granular hook registration
- Implement EventListeners struct with:
  - subscribe()/unsubscribe() for dynamic session-level event listeners
  - notify() to fan-out AgentEvent to all registered subscribers
  - notify_tool_start/end() for typed tool lifecycle hooks
  - notify_stream_event() for raw provider StreamEvent access
- Custom Debug impl showing subscriber count and hook presence
- Wire EventListeners into AgentSessionHandle with subscribe(),
  unsubscribe(), listeners(), listeners_mut() accessor methods
- make_combined_callback() merges per-prompt callback with session-level
  subscribers and typed hooks in correct dispatch order

SessionOptions expansion:
- Add on_event, on_tool_start, on_tool_end, on_stream_event fields
  for session-level callback registration at construction time
- Wire into EventListeners during create_agent_session()

RPC type definitions (~200 lines):
- RpcModelInfo: model metadata with cost, context window, input types
- RpcSessionState: full session state snapshot (model, thinking, streaming,
  compaction, steering mode, follow-up mode, session file/id/name)
- RpcSessionStats + RpcTokenStats: session-level token aggregates
- RpcCancelledResult, RpcCycleModelResult, RpcThinkingLevelResult
- RpcBashResult, RpcCompactionResult, RpcForkResult, RpcForkMessage
- RpcCommandInfo, RpcExportHtmlResult, RpcLastAssistantText
- SessionPromptResult enum (InProcess vs RpcEvents)
- SessionTransportEvent and SessionTransportState wrappers

RpcTransportClient (~350 lines):
- Subprocess-backed JSON-line transport for 'pi --mode rpc'
- connect() spawns child process with piped stdin/stdout
- write_json_line()/read_json_line() for framed communication
- Generic request()/request_typed()/request_no_data() helpers
- Full RPC command coverage: prompt, steer, follow_up, abort,
  new_session, switch_session, get_state, get_session_stats,
  get_messages, get_available_models, set_model, cycle_model,
  set_thinking_level, cycle_thinking_level, set_steering_mode,
  set_follow_up_mode, set_auto_compaction, set_auto_retry,
  abort_retry, set_session_name, get_last_assistant_text,
  export_html, bash, abort_bash, compact, fork, get_fork_messages,
  get_commands
- Drop impl calls shutdown() for clean subprocess cleanup

SessionTransport unified adapter:
- Enum wrapping InProcess(AgentSessionHandle) | RpcSubprocess(RpcTransportClient)
- Unified prompt(), state(), set_model(), shutdown() dispatching
  across both transports

stream_event_from_assistant_message_event():
- Converts AssistantMessageEvent variants to raw StreamEvent for
  the on_stream_event typed hook

Tests (~230 lines):
- EventListeners: subscribe/notify, unsubscribe returns false for
  unknown IDs, multiple subscribers, tool hooks fire, stream event
  hook fires, Debug impl
- SessionOptions: on_event wires into listeners
- AgentSessionHandle: subscribe/unsubscribe lifecycle
- stream_event_from_assistant_message_event: TextDelta converts,
  Start returns None
- RPC serde: RpcSessionState round-trips via JSON

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
